subject: english
description: 頻度の副詞（always, usually, often, sometimes, never）は一般動詞の前に置きます。

questions.question: I ___ play games. (sometimes)
questions.explanation: 頻度を表す副詞は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: I ___ study English. (usually)
questions.explanation: 頻度を表す副詞は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: She ___ reads books. (often)
questions.explanation: 頻度を表す副詞は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: He ___ plays games. (never)
questions.explanation: never（決して〜ない）は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: I am ___ happy. (always)
questions.explanation: be動詞の後に頻度の副詞を置きます

questions.question: She ___ goes to school early. (always)
questions.explanation: always（いつも）は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: He ___ eats breakfast. (rarely)
questions.explanation: rarely（めったに〜ない）は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: We ___ play together on weekends. (usually)
questions.explanation: 頻度を表す副詞は一般動詞の前に置きます

questions.question: She is ___ late for class. (sometimes)
questions.explanation: be動詞の後に頻度の副詞を置きます

questions.question: They ___ visit their grandparents. (often)
questions.explanation: 頻度を表す副詞は一般動詞の前に置きます
